tasks.preview:authorize-site: MAINZ_OUT_DIR=dist/examples/authorize-site/csr MAINZ_RENDER_MODE=csr MAINZ_NAVIGATION_MODE=spa deno run -A npm:vite preview --config vite.config.authorize-site.ts --host --port 4176
